nasb.text: When they are diminished and bowed down Through oppression, misery and sorrow,

esv.text: When they are diminished and brought low through oppression, evil, and sorrow,

cnv.text: 以後他們因為壓迫、患難、愁苦， 就人數減少，降為卑微。

ccb.text: 后来他们在压迫、患难和痛苦的煎熬下人口减少， 地位卑下。

csbs.text: 后来因着压迫、灾祸和悲哀的事， 他们就人数减少，降为卑微。
